bird.name: Scaled chachalaca
bird.summary: The scaled chachalaca (Ortalis squamata) is a species of bird in the family Cracidae, the chachalacas, guans, and curassows. It is endemic…

locations.name: 常綠森林
locations.summary: 常綠森林是由常綠樹木組成的森林。它們出現在廣泛的氣候帶中，包括寒冷氣候中的針葉樹和冬青樹等樹木，溫帶地區的桉樹、活橡樹、金合歡和班克樹，以及熱帶地區的雨林樹木。針葉溫帶常綠森林最常以科中的物種為主。樹木包括：松科和柏科。闊葉溫帶常綠森林包…

relations.subject: Scaled chachalaca
relations.evidence: It inhabits the edges of tropical evergreen forest and the interior and edges of restinga and Laguncularia racemosa-dominated mangrove stands

relations.subject: Scaled chachalaca
relations.evidence: It does face hunting pressure and loss of habitat from deforestation
relations.object_summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。

relations.subject: Scaled chachalaca
relations.evidence: It does face hunting pressure and loss of habitat from deforestation
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
